subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath arisen to serve the Cause and hath acknowledged that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken: verily there is none other God but He, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من قام علی خدمه الامر و اعترف بما نطق به لسان العظمه انه لا اله الا هو العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
